title: Create Aeronautics: Powered by Pollution
description: A joke addon for Create Aeronautics that turns air pollution into propulsion.
body:
A joke mod that makes GregTech CEu Modern muffler hatches usable as propulsion blocks in Create Aeronautics.

Strictly speaking, this is for Sable rather than Create Aeronautics itself, but it uses this name for clarity.

## Usage
Simply replace propulsion-producing blocks such as propellers with GregTech CEu Modern multiblocks that use muffler hatches, such as the EBF.
The multiblock must be running in order to generate thrust.

![EBF Ship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Lapis256/Powered-by-Pollution/refs/heads/1.21.1/images/ebf_ship.png)

Lower-tier muffler hatches generate force more efficiently. In other words, the more you pollute the planet, the more efficient it becomes.
It also produces greater thrust with higher energy usage and greater parallelism.

![Ridiculously Fast EBF](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Lapis256/Powered-by-Pollution/refs/heads/1.21.1/images/ridiculously_fast_ebf.gif)
